info.description: Laboratory service facilitates all aspects of the laboratory workflow including process execution, equipment and material usage, sample management, analytical testing, results reporting, and review and compliance. Laboratory exposes a subset of its resources through web services implementing the REST architecture.
info.summary: Laboratory Data Management Public REST APIs
info.title: Laboratory Web Services

get.description: Find configured workflow resources based on criteria specified by query parameters

200.description: Returns summary information for each configured workflow matching the query

403.description: User does not have appropriate roles to access the laboratory system

get.summary: Get details about a configured workflow
get.description: Retrieve metadata about a configured workflow by id

200.description: Returns the details of the configured workflow associated to the provided id

404.description: Requested resource doesn't exist, or the current user is not authorized to view this resource

403.description: User does not have appropriate roles to access the laboratory system

patch.description: Currently only the externalId property of the configured workflow, and of its associated studyCandidates can be updated using this API. Any request to update other configured workflow properties will result in a 422 response

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description:
Version of the resource. If the version on the server is different, this operation will return a 412 response code to prevent operations on outdated resources.

Valid values are integers and the string 'force'(case-insensitive; update is attempted 3 times, fetching the latest version number)

Updates involving studyCandidate/s should use 'force'

parameters.name: X-REQUESTED-WITH
parameters.description: Header for CSRF. Value is Batch (case sensitive) and no header ORIGIN or value is XMLHttpRequest (case sensitive) and the header ORIGIN (case insensitive) exists

207.description: Check the individual operations status' in the response

404.description: Requested resource doesn't exist, or the current user is not authorized to view this resource

400.description: Unauthenticated User, or Invalid and/or Incorrect JSON in request

example3.summary: Response for deviation from API request body format
example3.value: Provided value '1234' for Json property 'externalId' is not of STRING type

403.description: User does not have appropriate roles to access the laboratory system, or the User is not authorized to edit this resource and/or the configured workflow's lifecycle state does not allow updates to the requested attribute/s

example2.summary: Workflow not in editable lifecycle state

value.errorMessage: Workflow: 35e69208-b54f-41d2-8bfe-ba6cc2db15fe cannot be updated in 'submitted' state.

412.description: Precondition failed. If-Match header absent, or does not match the current version of the resource (Get the latest version of the resource from the server and update the header)

422.description: Unsupported operation. Updating the value of the 'externalId' property is the only currently supported operation from this API

patch.summary: Update results of a configured workflow
patch.description:
Update results of configured workflow by id, in accordance with the values provided in request body.

The API supports result updates for Numeric, Quantity, Vocabulary(case insensitive update), Boolean(case insensitive update), and Integer result types.

parameters.name: X-REQUESTED-WITH
parameters.description: Header for CSRF. Value is Batch (case sensitive) and no header ORIGIN or value is XMLHttpRequest (case sensitive) and the header ORIGIN (case insensitive) exists

requestBody.description: Any additional JSON names / keys other than those mentioned below in the example, are ignored if provided

404.description: Requested resource doesn't exist, or the current user is not authorized to view this resource, or Workflow ID is not provided

400.description: Unauthenticated User, or Invalid/Incorrect JSON in request

example2.summary: Response for incorrect Json and/or deviation from API request body format

403.description: User does not have appropriate roles to access the laboratory system, or the User is not authorized to edit this resource

example2.summary: Workflow not in required lifecycle state

value.errorMessage: Workflow: 35e69208-b54f-41d2-8bfe-ba6cc2db15fe is not in 'inProgress' state. Results of a Workflow not in 'inProgress' state cannot be updated

422.description: Unsupported operation. When Workflow doesn't have any studyParameters or they are not allowed for update from the API (ex: all studyParameters are associated to a sample plan)

example1.summary: No StudyParameters present or they are not allowed for update form API

value.errorMessage: No studyParameters present in the workflow: 35e69208-b54f-41d2-8bfe-ba6cc2db15fe, or they are not allowed for update from the API

207.description: Check the individual operations status' in the response

top.name: $top
top.description:
OData-styled parameter that specifies how many items to return.

Example $top=10 will return 10 items

skip.name: $skip
skip.description:
OData-styled parameter that specifies how many items to skip from the start of the items to return.

Example $skip=7 will skip the first 7 items from the results

orderby.name: $orderby
orderby.description:
OData-styled parameter that specifies the order of the items returned.

Example $orderby=name desc will order the results by name in descending order

filter.name: pattern
filter.description: The value is case insensitive and compared against the jobId and name attributes of the configured workflow. If either attribute contains the pattern string, it is included in the results. Note that this web service does *not* support having multi-pattern parameters
